name: Scout
description: Scout does the digging for you: market research, competitor analysis, due diligence, and topic deep-dives. It reads widely, cites everything, and hands you a clear, decision-ready summary.
capabilities: Run deep research on markets, companies, people, and topics
Compare competitors across the dimensions that matter
Synthesize many sources into a clear, structured brief
Cite every claim so you can trust and verify it
Flag what's uncertain, contested, or missing
example_prompts: Give me a competitive analysis of the top 5 project management tools.
Research the market for eco-friendly packaging in 2026.
What do I need to know before pitching this company?
